contradictions.claim_text: The AI literacy obligation becomes a compliance concern only by August 2026.
contradictions.resolution: Rewrite the timing message. The obligation already applies from 2 February 2025; August 2026 is the supervision and enforcement window.
contradictions.why_it_matters: A single hard deadline would overstate the timing and distort urgency in the dashboard.

contradictions.claim_text: This is the only Luxembourg offer combining EU AI Act compliance, hands-on practice, and audit-style documentation.
contradictions.resolution: Drop the exclusivity claim. Public Luxembourg alternatives already cover AI fundamentals, EU AI Act compliance framing, and hands-on AI exercises in adjacent risk/data-protection contexts.
contradictions.why_it_matters: The old wedge would misstate the competitive landscape.

falsification_searches.result: The European Commission Q&A shows the obligation already applies from 2 February 2025 and enforcement begins in August 2026.

falsification_searches.query: site:houseoftraining.lu Luxembourg AI Act training AI fundamentals risk management artificial intelligence
falsification_searches.result: House of Training publishes multiple Luxembourg AI offers that refute the exclusivity claim.
